agent.title: Agent: {role}
agent.default_backstory: Driven by curiosity, you're at the forefront of innovation, eager to explore and share knowledge that could change the world.

crew.title: Crew: {name}
crew.name: Name (just id, it doesn't affect anything)
crew.confirm_delete_message: This action will delete the selected crew. You can optionally delete its agents and tasks.
crew.conflict_note: If an item is used elsewhere it's marked as a conflict and unchecked by default.
crew.invalid_warning: This Streamlit version does not support st.dialog – please upgrade Streamlit.
crew.not_valid: This crew is not valid. Please fix the issues.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Knowledge sources are used to provide external information to your agents. You can upload documents, paste text, or link to URLs.
knowledge.name: Name
knowledge.source_path_hint: Enter file path relative to the 'knowledge' directory or a URL for docling
knowledge.clear_help: This will clear all knowledge stores in CrewAI, removing cached embeddings

export.title: Import/export
export.import_success_full: Full database JSON file imported successfully!
export.import_error: Invalid JSON format. Please upload a valid crew or full database export file.

warning.crew_no_manager: Crew {name} has no manager agent or manager llm set for hierarchical process
warning.crew_no_planning_llm: Crew {name} has planning enabled but no planning LLM selected

tool.scrape_website_desc: A tool that can be used to read website content.
tool.file_read_desc: A tool that can be used to read a file's content.
tool.directory_search_desc: A tool that can be used to semantic search a query from a directory's content.
tool.directory_read_desc: Use the tool to list the contents of the specified directory
tool.code_docs_search_desc: A tool that can be used to search through code documentation.
tool.youtube_video_search_desc: A tool that can be used to semantic search a query from a Youtube Video content.
tool.serper_dev_desc: A tool that can be used to search the internet with a search_query
tool.youtube_channel_search_desc: A tool that can be used to semantic search a query from a Youtube Channels content. Channel can be added as @channel
tool.website_search_desc: A tool that can be used to semantic search a query from a specific URL content.
tool.csv_search_desc: A tool that can be used to semantic search a query from a CSV's content.
tool.code_interpreter_desc: A tool that interprets code and executes it
tool.pdf_search_desc: A tool that can be used to search through PDF documents
tool.custom_api_desc: Tool to make API calls with customizable parameters
tool.custom_file_write_desc: Tool to write or append to files
tool.custom_code_interpreter_desc: Tool to interpret and execute code
tool.scrape_website_enhanced_desc: Enhanced tool for scraping website content
tool.csv_search_enhanced_desc: Enhanced tool for searching CSV files
tool.endpoint: The specific endpoint for the API call
tool.method: HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
tool.headers: HTTP headers to include in the request
tool.body: Body of the request for POST/PUT methods
tool.content: The content to write or append to the file
tool.mode: Mode to open the file in, either 'w' or 'a'
tool.filename: The name of the file to write to or append
tool.http_method: HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
tool.http_headers: HTTP headers to include in the request
tool.request_body: Body of the request for POST/PUT methods
tool.file_content: The content to write or append to the file
tool.file_mode: Mode to open the file in, either 'w' or 'a'
tool.access_denied: Access outside the base directory is not allowed
tool.error_code_or_script_required: Either code or run_script must be provided
tool.error_code_or_script_only_one: Only one of code or run_script can be provided
